name: Hystax
description: Hystax — Cloud cost management and FinOps platform with automated optimization for AWS, Azure, and GCP.

seo.title: Hystax — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: Hystax: Hystax — Cloud cost management and FinOps platform with automated optimization for AWS, Azure, and GCP.

when_to_use: Cloud cost management and optimization across AWS/Azure/GCP
FinOps automation with rightsizing and reserved instance advice
Cloud migration with cost modeling for enterprise workloads
Multi-cloud cost governance with team-level attribution
Disaster recovery and cloud migration planning in one platform

pros: Full FinOps plus disaster recovery in one platform
Multi-cloud support across AWS, Azure, GCP
cons: Smaller brand awareness than CloudHealth or Flexera
DR and FinOps combo may be more than you need
UI can feel busy with overlapping features
review.verdict: Decent multi-cloud FinOps with an open-source core, less market share and polish than category leaders.
review.best_for: Mid-market teams wanting FinOps with an open-source option they can self-host
review.not_for: Enterprises requiring a top-tier FinOps brand with a large partner ecosystem
